author: Johan Sanneblad
description: Pixel perfect 100% image resizing, copy to clipboard, show image in Finder/Explorer, edit image in external editor, and much more.

manifest.author: Johan Sanneblad
manifest.description: Pixel perfect 100% image resizing, copy to clipboard, show image in Finder/Explorer, edit image in external editor, and much more.
manifest.name: Pixel Perfect Image

name: Pixel Perfect Image

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixed

- Fixed duplicate context menus on images in Obsidian 1.12 and later.
- Fixed local file actions opening the wrong image when multiple folders contain the same filename.
- Fixed so that clicks in plugin windows no longer trigger Pixel Perfect Image actions.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New

- External images can now be copied to the clipboard.
- External images can now be resized like local images.

### Improved

- **Finally fixed image resizing on mobile trackpads**! 🎉 Give it a go and let me know if it works for you!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New

- **SVG Support**. You can now resize SVG images like any other image. Copying SVG images is not supported since Obsidian clipboard only supports bitmap images.

### Improved

- Settings now support the new **SettingGroup API** in Obsidian 1.11 and later. Settings groups are now clearly outlined.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New

- You can now copy external images to clipboard. See https://github.com/johansan/pixel-perfect-image/issues/28
- New menu options: `Open to the right`, and `Open in new window` to complement `Open in new tab`. See https://github.com/johansan/pixel-perfect-image/issues/23

### Fixed

- Pixel perfect image menu is now only shown in markdown documents, not canvas documents. See https://github.com/johansan/pixel-perfect-image/issues/29

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Upgraded to latest obsidian@1.8.7 package

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Minimum Obsidian version is now 1.8.0 for language translations to work

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Pixel Perfect Image is now localized and speaks your language!

🇬🇧 English: Pixel Perfect
🇩🇪 Deutsch: Pixelgenau
🇪🇸 Español: Píxel Perfecto
🇫🇷 Français: Pixel Parfait
🇯🇵 日本語: ピクセルパーフェクト
🇨🇳 中文: 像素完美

Also reorganized the source code and moved to a service based architecture.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Plugin will no longer show full menu for external images. Only "Copy image URL" will be visible for external images.

Also migrated from ESLINT 8 to ESLINT 9 and added support for the official eslint-plugin-obsidianmd in the build chain. Plugin now builds with 0 errors 0 warnings with extensive verifications.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**FIXED**

Fixed an issue where the right-click context menu would only show in reading mode but not in edit mode in recent Obsidian versions.

Recent Obsidian versions changed how context menu events are handled in edit mode; fixed by using capture mode for event listeners to ensure our menu appears before Obsidian's default handling.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvements**

- Resize options can now be fully customizable! For example 25%, 50%, 100%, 600px
- Added "Do nothing" as option for CMD/CTRL + click, if you want other plugins to handle it

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: New feature: "Delete image and link" to remove both the source image and all links to the image in the current document.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: New setting for CMD + click: Open in external editor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**

- New setting: **CMD/CTRL + click behavior**. You can now choose between **Open in new tab** and **Open in default program**

**Improvements**

- If an image cannot be copied to clipboard due to the editor window not having focus (an Electron limitation) the plugin will now show you why this happens in the notification.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Fixes**

- Fix for spaces in markdown links
- Remove unneccessary console logging

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Fixes
- Plugin now correctly handles multi-touch events on mobile devices
- Plugin now ignores document links that were internally seen as image links
- Improved trackpad resizing especially on Mac laptops
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.11

releases.author: johansan
releases.description: Minor adjustment to behavior of "hide percentage resize options if not needed".
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.10

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Improvements:
- Added option to hide the percentage resize options if not needed.
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.9

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
New features:
- Now supports multiple custom sizes! Just add them as comma separated list!
- Plugin now preserves custom attributes when resizing images. Width is added as the last parameter instead of replacing all attributes.

Example: ![[image.png|attribute1 attribute2]] → ![[image.png|attribute1 attribute2|200]] instead of just ![[image.png|200]]

Fixes: 
- Zoom slider no longer goes to 0 in settings
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.8

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Fixes
- Now works with URL-encoded image links like "Pasted%20image%2020250219115508.png"
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.7

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
## What's New

### New Features
- ✏️ **Image Renaming**: You can now rename image files directly from the context menu
- 🔍 **Quick Open in New Tab**: Use CMD/CTRL + click on any image to open it in a new tab
- 🖱️ **Mobile Support**: Added long-press support for context menu on mobile devices

### Improvements
- **Enhanced Menu Organization**: Context menu items are now better organized and more customizable
- **Customizable Menu Options**: Each menu item can be individually enabled/disabled in settings
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.6

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Improvements
- New option: **Custom resize width.** Set a custom resize width in pixels (leave empty to disable). When enabled this shows a new menu option allowing you to quickly resize to a set width.
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.5

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Improvements
- Added zoom reset button to "Zoom step size" in Settings

Fixes
- Fixed so document does not scroll when using mouse wheel scroll
- Fixed spelling in some menus
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.4

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Fixes requested by the Obsidian Team:

- Changed to Platform.isMacOS to detect operating system
- Changed all UI text to "Sentence case"
- Changed to vault.process to update file contents
- Switched to getBasePath() for FileSystemAdapter

Also improved the right-click menu on Windows PCs, and added separate paths for external app on Mac and Windows if you use Obsidian cross-platform.
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.3

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Internal improvements
- Switched to Obsidian's built-in debounce processing
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.2

releases.author: johansan
releases.description:
Improvements

- Now supports Mouse Wheel zoom! Using a modifier key you can now resize images with your mouse wheel.
- New menu option: Remove Custom Size - will be shown if a custom size is set for an image.
- Current scale factor will now be shown after the file name, such as "Image.png @ 50%"

Fixes

- Disabled zoom menu options in "Reading view"
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.1

releases.author: johansan
releases.description: First release of Pixel Perfect Image
releases.name: Pixel Perfect Image 1.0.0
